China ASN CIDR aggregation lists

Auto-generated from public MRT collectors (RouteViews, RIPE RIS, PCH). Plain-text CIDR lists, one prefix per line.

  • cernet_edu_v4.txt
  • china_all_v4.txt
  • china_domestic_backbone_v4.txt
  • chinamobile_global_v4.txt
  • chinamobile_v4.txt
  • chinatelecom_global_v4.txt
  • chinatelecom_v4.txt
  • chinaunicom_global_v4.txt
  • chinaunicom_v4.txt
  • cernet_edu_v6.txt
  • china_all_v6.txt
  • china_domestic_backbone_v6.txt
  • chinamobile_global_v6.txt
  • chinamobile_v6.txt
  • chinatelecom_global_v6.txt

  • chinaunicom_global_v6.txt
